applied_optimizations.name: Triton fused subtract+mish kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented fused_subtract_mish_kernel using Triton that combines subtract and Mish activation. Key fixes from failed attempt: (1) Replaced tl.math.tanh with manual implementation using tl.math.exp and clamping to [-10, 10], (2) Added explicit float32 dtype casting on load/store, (3) Used BLOCK_SIZE=256 (multiple of 64 for AMD wavefront alignment). Achieves 1.44x speedup (3.76ms vs 5.42ms baseline).

notes: The conv is already optimized (likely by torch.compile/rocBLAS), our Triton kernel successfully fuses subtract+mish
Further optimization could target fusing the conv bias add into the conv or into our Triton kernel

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Three consecutive trials (2, 3, 4) produced no output. The agent is likely crashing during edits. Need extremely specific instructions to make a minimal, safe change to the working solution.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Four consecutive trials (2-5) produced no output. The agent is crashing during edits. Need to give extremely specific, minimal, copy-paste-safe instructions to fuse bias into the Triton kernel.
